savage_but_scientific_verdict.final_roast: These commands suffer from the same disease as enterprise Java frameworks - they solve simple problems with complex solutions, then create complex problems that need more complex solutions. It's complexity inception. The real intelligence would be knowing when NOT to think so hard.
